title: Rydberg Blockade Mechanism: The Foundation of Neutral Atom Gates
description: Master the Rydberg blockade phenomenon - how strong interactions between Rydberg atoms enable entangling operations and form the foundation for two-qubit gates in neutral atom quantum computers.
learningObjectives: Explain the physical mechanism of Rydberg blockade
Calculate the blockade radius and its dependence on system parameters
Derive the collective Rabi oscillation dynamics in the blockade regime
Understand the difference between blockade and anti-blockade regimes
Analyze blockade fidelity and sources of error
